criteria.raw_request: get me a pokemon card with the highest value for money, under budget $100
criteria.item_summary: Pokémon card with the best collectible value-for-money, under $100
criteria.notes: For trading cards, 'value for money' means the most collectible upside per dollar. Strategy: bias toward authenticity-protected value (graded slabs), vintage WOTC-era holos that historically hold value, and freshly-listed underpriced singles; hard-exclude proxies/fakes. Cap at the $100 budget. Authenticity is the #1 risk, so reward graded/established sellers and flag the rest.

plans.label: Graded value · PSA/CGC vintage holo under budget
